name: Ky Colonels Secret Pork BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Cool overnight, then warm before using.
5. Start basting meat with this at the beginning of the cooking process.
6. Baste and turn until pork registers 170 degrees on a meat thermometer (takes about 20 minutes for country ribs).
